title: UNION operator malfunctions in LEFT JOIN on view
poc: CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT CAST(t0.c0 AS INTEGER) FROM t0;
SELECT * FROM t0 LEFT JOIN v0 ON v0.c0 >= '0' WHERE TRUE UNION SELECT 0,0 WHERE 0;
key_bug_features: UNION operator in LEFT JOIN on view fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 TEXT NOT NULL, c2 REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, CAST(c2 AS INTEGER) AS c2_int FROM t1;
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN v1 ON v1.c2_int >= 1 WHERE TRUE UNION SELECT 'fallback', 0 WHERE 0;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (NULL, NULL);
